words.meaning: to go out, to exit (pf) — prefix вы- (out) + идти
words.example: Он вышел из дома рано утром.
words.exampleMeaning: He went out of the house early in the morning.

words.meaning: to arrive, to come (pf) — prefix при- (arrival) + идти
words.example: Она пришла домой в шесть часов.
words.exampleMeaning: She came home at six o'clock.

words.meaning: to leave, to go away (pf) — prefix у- (away) + идти
words.example: Он ушёл с работы раньше обычного.
words.exampleMeaning: He left work earlier than usual.

words.meaning: to enter, to come in (pf) — prefix в- (into) + идти
to cross, to go across (pf) — prefix пере- (across) + идти
words.example: Нужно перейти дорогу на зелёный свет.
words.exampleMeaning: You need to cross the road at a green light.

words.meaning: to pass through, to walk past (pf) — prefix про- (through) + идти
to drive out, to depart by vehicle (pf) — prefix вы- (out) + ехать
words.example: Мы выехали из города в семь утра.
words.exampleMeaning: We drove out of the city at seven in the morning.

words.meaning: to arrive by vehicle (pf) — prefix при- (arrival) + ехать
words.exampleMeaning: They arrived from St. Petersburg yesterday.

words.meaning: to drive away, to leave by vehicle (pf) — prefix у- (away) + ехать
to approach, to come up to (pf) — prefix под- (toward) + идти
words.example: Он подошёл к окну и посмотрел на улицу.
words.exampleMeaning: He approached the window and looked at the street.

words.meaning: to step away, to move back (pf) — prefix от- (away from) + идти
words.exampleMeaning: Step away from the edge of the platform.

words.meaning: to drop by, to stop in (pf) — prefix за- (behind/by) + идти
words.exampleMeaning: Drop by my place after work.

words.meaning: to go around, to bypass (pf) — prefix об- (around) + идти
words.exampleMeaning: We had to go around the building.

words.meaning: to reach, to walk to (pf) — prefix до- (up to) + идти
words.example: Мы дошли до станции за десять минут.
words.exampleMeaning: We reached the station in ten minutes.
I found the keys on the table.

words.meaning: to set off, to start going (pf) — prefix по- (start of motion) + идти
words.exampleMeaning: Let's go to the movies today.

items.sentence: Он ___ из дома в восемь утра. (went out)
Мы ___ до станции за пять минут. (reached)
Она ___ домой поздно вечером. (arrived, on foot)

items.question: What does the prefix 'при-' add to a motion verb?
What does 'зайти' mean?
options: To drop by, to stop in
